posts.content:
New feature drop! 🚀

We just shipped cross-platform scheduling for Telegram channels and groups.

Now you can schedule to all 11 platforms from one dashboard:
✅ TikTok
✅ Instagram
✅ Facebook
✅ X (Twitter)
✅ YouTube
✅ LinkedIn
✅ Threads
✅ Bluesky
✅ Pinterest
✅ Telegram
✅ Google Business Profile

Try it free: https://postfa.st
